maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Standalone
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (standalone primary dealers) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Standalone
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Standalone'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Standalone Primary
Dealers) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Standalone
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (standalone primary dealers) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Standalone
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Standalone'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Standalone
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Standalone' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Standalone
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Standalone'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Refer as prescribed in paragraph'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: SPD shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Refer as prescribed in paragraph
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Refer as prescribed in paragraph
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Refer as prescribed in paragraph'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Refer as prescribed in paragraph
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Refer as prescribed in paragraph' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Refer as prescribed in paragra
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Refer as prescribed in paragraph'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: SPDs shall disclose in the 'Notes on Accounts' to their Balance sheets the details
as per Appendix 1, in respect of the CDS transactions undertaken by them.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Disclose on Accounts' to their
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Disclose on Accounts' to their'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Disclose on Accounts' to their
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Disclose on Accounts' to their'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Disclose on Accounts' to their
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Disclose on Accounts' to their'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Disclose on Accounts' to their
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Disclose on Accounts' to their'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Be cash settled 2
maps.objective: To ensure be physically settled b) cash settled 2

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be cash settled 2
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be cash settled 2'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: of transactions during the year
a) of which transactions that are/ may be
physically settled
b) cash settled
2.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be cash settled 2
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be physically settled b) cash settled 2. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be cash settled 2
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be cash settled 2'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be cash settled 2
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be cash settled 2' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be cash settled 2
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be cash settled 2'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
